name: User Story
about: Define a new user story and its acceptance criteria for forakilo
title: '[STORY] <Brief description>'
labels: user story, enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## User Story
**As a** [type of user, e.g., quantitative researcher, risk manager, retail trader],
**I want** [an action or feature, e.g., the bot to calculate the Sharpe Ratio during backtests],
**So that** [benefit/value, e.g., I can evaluate risk-adjusted returns before deploying live capital].

---

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Criterion 1 (e.g., Successfully pulls historical data for specified date ranges)
- [ ] Criterion 2 (e.g., Output includes automated calculation of slippage and exchange fees)
- [ ] Criterion 3 (e.g., Logs errors gracefully if API rate limits are exceeded)

---

## Technical Notes / Constraints
* **Target Markets:** [e.g., Forex / Crypto / Both]
* **Dependencies:** [e.g., Pandas, CCXT, PyTorch]
